DmDedicateConnection

Dedicates a connection to a specific threaded command handler.

DMHRAPI DmDedicateConnection(
    PDM_CONNECTION pdcon,
    LPCSTR szHandler
);

Parameters

pdcon
Pointer to a DM_CONNECTION structure that contains the connection information.
szHandler
LPCSTR that identifies the threaded command handler to be dedicated.

Return Values

Returns XBDM_DEDICATED if successful, an error value otherwise.

Remarks

When a title first opens a connection with DmOpenConnection, the title may use that connection only to invoke built-in commands or commands directed at non-threaded handlers. Any attempt to invoke a threaded handler results in the error XBDM_MUSTBEDEDICATED. To invoke a command directed at a threaded handler, the title must first dedicate that connection to a specific handler by calling DmDedicateConnection. The call to DmDedicateConnection should follow the title's call to DmOpenConnection.

Once a connection has been dedicated, the connection may be used only to invoke commands directed at the specific dedicated handler. Any attempt to use a dedicated connection to invoke built-in commands or commands directed at non-threaded handlers results in the error XBDM_MUSTBEDEDICATED. A title may re-dedicate a connection to another handler at any time by calling DmDedicateConnection again. Passing NULL for the szHandler parameter to DmDedicateConnection re-dedicates the connection to the global server thread, which allows the connection to once again be used for built-in commands.

Requirements

Header: Declared in XboxDbg.h.

Import Library: Use XbDm.lib for target system code; use XboxDbg.lib for development system code.

See Also

DmOpenConnection, DmRegisterCommandProcessorEx, DmRegisterThreadedCommandProcessor
